$comment: Curated static selection for invoice-desk-01. collection-table-01 supplies the collection baseline; the implementation adds a local payment transition and derived customer/collection views.

assumptions: collection-table-01 is the stocked collection screen pattern and its sidebar, filter, and table structure fit the application.
All visible values derive from one static invoice fixture plus local paid state.
Payment recording is intentionally client-only and is presented as a session-local action.
risks: No live accounting data, authorization, payment processing, or persistence is connected.
The fixture does not model loading, error, permission, or concurrent-update states.
